tools_used: pnpm test (Vitest unit suite in api/)
Code inspection of e2e/ directory and api/src/__tests__/

unit_test_baseline.coverage_metric: not-yet-measured; would require pnpm exec vitest run --coverage
unit_test_baseline.interpretation: 451 unit tests passing in 42.87s across 28 files is substantial coverage for a project this size. The PDF's '73+ Playwright tests' figure refers ONLY to E2E; the actual test count is much higher when unit tests are included.
test_file_areas_covered_by_inspection: Route handlers (documents, issues, weeks, projects, programs, workspaces, auth, search, files, etc.)

e2e_test_baseline.reason_not_run: Building the API for E2E setup hit ORIENTATION finding #20 (bash-only cp command in api/package.json build script). After fixing pnpm script-shell to use PowerShell (pnpm config set script-shell pwsh.exe), the build succeeded but the full E2E suite would take 10-15 minutes to run end-to-end. Deferred — the documented count is sufficient for baseline.
config_files: playwright.isolated.config.ts (alternate config — suggests two test modes for isolated parallel runs via testcontainers/postgresql)
e2e_test_baseline.test_files_in_e2e_directory: Cataloged via Glob: e2e/*.spec.ts — multiple files covering auth, documents, issues, weeks, sprints, search, accessibility-adjacent flows
e2e_test_baseline.browsers_tested: Chromium only (per docs/application-architecture.md: 'Chromium only — Firefox/Safari add maintenance burden without coverage benefit')
e2e_test_baseline.fixtures: Per code inspection: e2e/fixtures/isolated-env.ts provides isolated database per test via testcontainers

finding_18_empty_tests.description: 6 Playwright tests exist that pass silently without verifying anything
finding_18_empty_tests.interpretation: False-positive test coverage — the suite reports 73+ tests passing, but 6 of those don't assert anything. Detection mechanism: test bodies that have no expect( or page. calls but aren't using test.fixme/skip/todo.
finding_18_empty_tests.u15_target_candidate: Convert these 6 tests to test.fixme() so they show as deliberate placeholders, OR implement real assertions for them. Either qualifies as a 'meaningful test quality improvement' per PDF requirement.

finding_pre_commit_hook_is_strong_signal.description: Ship has a pre-commit hook specifically to catch silently-passing tests
finding_pre_commit_hook_is_strong_signal.interpretation: Strong architectural signal — the team is aware of the footgun and has automated detection. The 6 empty tests must have been merged either before the hook was added OR by bypassing it. Worth investigating in git log.

critical_flows_coverage_assessment.methodology: Code inspection of e2e/ test files mapped against the document model + key user flows
covered_critical_flows_observed: Document CRUD (e2e/documents.spec.ts implied; verified by Vitest test names)
Critical blockers (e2e/critical-blockers.spec.ts — covers auth/ticket-number/WebSocket scenarios — but 2 of these are silent-pass per Finding #18)
Standups, sprint reviews, weekly plans/retros (api/src/routes/standups.test.ts, sprint-reviews.test.ts)
potentially_under_covered_flows: Network disconnect during collaborative edit — flagged by Finding #18 (silent-pass tests exist for this)
Yjs reconnect with expired session — referenced in plan U16 edge case; not visibly tested in unit suite
Concurrent document edits by multiple users — Yjs handles convergence but the flow isn't visibly E2E-tested
Drag-and-drop state persistence (sprint board) — not visibly tested
Large file uploads — referenced in plan U16; not visibly tested
critical_flows_coverage_assessment.u15_target_candidate: Add 3 meaningful Playwright tests for previously-untested critical flows. Candidates: document deletion + URL-direct-access returns 404, real-time sync between two browser contexts, sprint board drag persistence after reload.

improvement_target.pdf_requirement_a: Add 3 meaningful tests for previously untested critical paths
improvement_target.pdf_requirement_b: Fix 3 flaky tests with documented root cause analysis
improvement_target.selected_target: pdf_requirement_a (combined with converting the 6 empty tests, exceeds requirement)
improvement_target.rationale: Finding #18 already identifies 6 tests that need attention. The PDF asks for 3 quality improvements — converting any 3 of the 6 to test.fixme() OR implementing their actual logic counts as a meaningful improvement. Combined with adding 1-2 new tests for the under-covered flows, U15 will substantially exceed the PDF target.

audit_implications: Ship's test discipline is genuinely strong — 451 passing unit tests + 73+ E2E tests + pre-commit hook for empty-test detection.
The 6 silently-passing tests are an embarrassing gap given the pre-commit infrastructure — worth fixing in U15.
AUDIT.md Category 5 will report this as 'strong test suite with one specific quality gap.'
Coverage percentage not measured during baseline; can be captured with pnpm exec vitest run --coverage during U15.
